meta.title: Lustimacy — Lifestyle Dating for Couples & Open-Minded Singles
meta.description: The lifestyle dating app for couples and open-minded singles. Link up to 3 partners on your profile, private photos that unlock at the match, travel mode. Now opening in Germany & the Netherlands — join the waitlist.
meta.keywords: lifestyle dating, dating for couples, open-minded singles, ethical non-monogamy, ENM, swinger app, couples dating app, private photos dating, travel mode dating
meta.ogImageAlt: Lustimacy — lifestyle dating app for couples and open-minded singles

hero.badgeDefault: Now opening in Germany & the Netherlands
hero.lede: Lustimacy is the lifestyle dating app for couples, polycules, and open-minded singles. Link up to 3 partners on your profile. Discreet by design, verified at the door, built around what you actually want.

waitlist.hintScarcity: Early access opens in waves. The first 1,000 founding members get a lifetime badge and zero-fee verification.
waitlist.legal: We'll only use your email to invite you in. No spam, no resale. Cancel any time.
waitlist.success: You're on the list. We'll be in touch from a lustimacy.com address — check your inbox (and Promotions tab).
waitlist.successInbox: We just sent a welcome to your inbox from a lustimacy.com address. If it doesn't arrive in a few minutes, check Promotions and Spam.
waitlist.referralLabel: Share your link → jump 10 spots per friend
waitlist.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Try again in a moment?
waitlist.errorEmail: That doesn't look like an email.

personas.title: Three kinds of curious
personas.lede: Lustimacy was designed from day one for the lifestyle community — couples in the scene, singles who play with couples, and adults exploring ethical non-monogamy on their own terms.

couples.title: Couples in the lifestyle
couples.body: Link up to 3 partners to your profile so matches see your relationship structure before the first message. Each of you keeps your own account and swipes independently — the connection is visible, not shared. Lustimacy is the first app to make this honest by default.

singles.title: Open-minded singles
singles.body: Filter for couples, singles, or both. See who's solo and who's got linked partners before you swipe. Detailed profiles tell you the lifestyle, the dynamic, and the energy before you ever start a chat.

curious.title: Curious, careful, kind
curious.body: New to the scene? Lustimacy is a low-pressure, judgment-free space to learn the language, ask questions, and meet people who'll meet you where you are. No tourists, no creeps, no rush.

features.title: What makes Lustimacy different
features.lede: Five things every other dating app gets wrong for the lifestyle. We built them from scratch.

couple.title: Linked partner profiles
couple.body: Link up to 3 partners to your profile. Their photos appear on yours, so matches see who you're already with before the first message. Each partner has their own login and swipes from their own deck — the relationship is visible, not shared.

mode.title: Real verification
mode.body: Every founding member is hand-verified by us — a selfie matched to a profile photo, reviewed by a human. Verification is free for founding members; no AI black-box, no checkbox. Verified-only filtering is one tap away.

privatePhotos.title: Private photos, unlocked at the match
privatePhotos.body: Upload the photos you only want a real connection to see. Non-matches see a tasteful BlurHash gradient — they know there's more, but the photo stays yours. The moment you match, it unlocks. No grant flow, no leaks.

travel.title: Travel mode
travel.body: Heading to Berlin for the weekend? Visiting a club on the Cap d'Agde corridor? Set a destination and a return date — match with locals before you land, then disappear from the local feed when you fly home.

filters.title: Filters that actually filter
filters.body: Looking for couples, singles, or both? Linked partners or solo? Body type, lifestyle, dynamic, distance, age. Every filter we built is one we use ourselves.

how.title: From sign-up to first chat
how.lede: Four steps. No filler, no questionnaires, no algorithm voodoo.

step1.title: Reserve your spot
step1.body: Drop your email. We'll email you the moment your country opens — and you keep your founding-member status forever.

step2.title: Build a profile that says it
step2.body: Tell us who you are, who you're with, what you're into. Link up to 3 partners to your profile; solos get the full filter set.

step3.title: Verify, in 30 seconds
step3.body: A simple selfie check. Verified profiles get a badge and end up in front of more matches. Verified-only filtering is one tap away.

step4.title: Match and meet
step4.body: When the feeling is mutual, the chat opens. Private photos unlock automatically. Take it from there.

demo.title: How a swipe feels
demo.lede: A real Lustimacy feed is filtered, verified, and curated. This is just a taste — drag a card or use the buttons.

beat1.title: Right means yes.
beat1.body: Mutual likes open a chat — same as you'd expect, no surprises.

beat2.title: Linked partners visible.
beat2.body: Every profile shows linked partners on the card — couples, triads, polycules, all upfront.

beat3.title: Private photos unlock instantly.
beat3.body: The blurred panels become the real photo the moment you match.

screens.title: Built for grown-ups
screens.alt1: Lustimacy home feed showing profiles with linked partners and singles
screens.alt2: Profile detail with verified badge, lifestyle preferences and orientation
screens.alt3: Link partners screen — invite up to 3 partners to your profile
screens.alt4: Private photo gallery with BlurHash placeholders, unlocked on match
screens.alt5: Search filters — couples, singles, linked partners, body, distance
screens.alt6: Match modal — partner shown with linked-profile indicator, chat opens
screens.alt7: Travel mode setup — destination city and return date
screens.alt8: In-app chat with a verified Lustimacy match

cities.title: Germany & the Netherlands first
cities.lede: Two countries with the most welcoming, established lifestyle scenes in Europe. We're going deep before we go wide — every founding member shapes the community before the gates open elsewhere.
cities.elsewhereBody: Outside Germany or the Netherlands? Drop your email — we open new countries based on demand, and waitlist members in your country go first when we do.

trust.title: Built on consent, verified at the door

verified.title: Real people only
verified.body: Every member completes a selfie verification before they can fully match. Verified-only filtering is one tap. Fakes are removed within hours, not days.

discreet.title: Discreet by design
discreet.body: No social-media linking. No public profile pages. Your account doesn't show up in Google searches. You decide what's visible and to whom.

consent.title: Consent, always
consent.body: Boundaries belong on every profile and we make them easy to set. Block, mute, and report tools take one tap. A human reads every report.

support.title: Real support
support.body: Reach a real person at info@lustimacy.com. We answer in hours during European working days, not weeks.

items.q: When does Lustimacy launch in my country?
items.a: We are currently opening in Germany and the Netherlands. Other countries roll out in waves through 2026 — waitlist members in each country go first when we open. Drop your email to be notified the moment your country goes live.

items.q: What does Lustimacy actually do for couples?
items.a: You can link up to 3 partners to your profile — their photos appear on yours, so matches see who you're already with before the first message. Each partner has their own account and swipes from their own deck; the connection is visible, not shared. It's the first app to make couple/polycule transparency a default, not a tag.

You upload private photos in your profile. People who haven't matched with you see only an elegant BlurHash gradient — they know more exists, but the photo itself stays yours. The moment you match, the photos unlock automatically for both of you. There's no grant flow to manage.

Set a destination city and a return date. Lustimacy shows you matches in that city before you arrive, and removes you from your home feed for the duration. Perfect for a lifestyle weekend in Berlin, Amsterdam, or anywhere on the European circuit.

Yes. Sign-up, swipe, match, and chat are free. A premium tier (Lustimacy Plus) adds priority visibility and 'who liked you,' similar to other dating apps. Founding members from the waitlist get a lifetime founder badge and zero-fee verification.

We never link to your social media, never sell your data, and never make your profile crawlable by search engines. Verification photos are checked then discarded. You can delete your account in two taps and your data is permanently removed within 30 days.

Ethical non-monogamy — relationships built on mutual awareness and consent. It includes the lifestyle, swinging, polyamory, open relationships, and everything in between. Lustimacy is a home for the whole spectrum.

Lustimacy is what you make of it. Some people are here for a weekend in Cap d'Agde; others are here to find a long-term play partner or a third for their relationship. The filters and detailed profiles let you find the speed and shape that fits you.

finalCta.title: Be among the first 1,000.
finalCta.lede: Founding members get lifetime status, zero-fee verification, and the first message into the community. The list closes at 1,000 per country.

footer.tagline: Lifestyle dating for couples and open-minded singles.
